summary.notes: Shape-semantic rerun only. SVGs were not edited. Repaired after_renders from owned_repair_batch10 were used because standard_source_table render paths still point at the pre-repair triad pack.
summary.selected_from: standard_source_table rows where helm_candidate.candidate_status == repaired_pending_judge_rerun and helm_candidate.source_batch == catalog/owned_repair_batch10.json

verdicts.expected_shape: lattice/tower beacon for beacon yb/full-chart; semantic_brief requires brown load-bearing body colour.
verdicts.judge_comments: Repair removed the previous black-body failure. The simplified trapezoid tower is acceptable for this shape-semantic gate because it preserves beacon/tower family and brown body cue.
verdicts.observed_shape: Compact brown/yellow-brown tower beacon body with black outline and stem; no wrong buoy/body family.
verdicts.required_change: No shape-semantic repair required; optional lattice/detail polish can wait for visual/style QA.

verdicts.expected_shape: Square brightness/contrast adjustment swatch matching the S-52/S-101/OpenCPN utility-symbol family.
verdicts.judge_comments: The repaired candidate is no longer a diamond/point marker and now matches the required utility swatch family.
verdicts.observed_shape: Black square control swatch with a smaller dark/gray inner square.

verdicts.expected_shape: Thin diagonal red/white border strip, not a point marker or closed body.
verdicts.judge_comments: The repaired candidate preserves the border-line symbol family and red/white ordering from the reference witness.
verdicts.observed_shape: Thin diagonal red strip with white center line.

verdicts.expected_shape: barrel buoy body; semantic_brief lists required colours red and black for BOYBAR01.
verdicts.judge_comments: Shape family is repaired, but this strict semantic-brief rerun cannot pass it because the current candidate only carries black outline/white fill while the brief says red and black are required colours.
verdicts.observed_shape: Barrel buoy outline/body with white fill and black outline; no red fill or red/black load-bearing colour pair.
verdicts.required_change: Resolve the brief/reference conflict, then render the barrel buoy with the required red/black colour semantics if the current semantic_brief is authoritative.

verdicts.expected_shape: can/cylindrical buoy body for BOYCAN01 paper-chart black can symbol.
verdicts.judge_comments: The repair fixes the previous filled full-chart body problem; black is carried by the paper-chart outline, and the can family is clear.
verdicts.observed_shape: Paper-chart can/cylindrical buoy outline with black stroke and no wrong conical/barrel substitution.

verdicts.expected_shape: can/cylindrical buoy body with semantic_brief required colours green and black.
verdicts.judge_comments: The family is now correct and there are no invented bands, but the repaired candidate does not satisfy the current brief colour requirement.
verdicts.observed_shape: Can/cylindrical buoy outline with white fill and black outline; no green load-bearing colour is present.
verdicts.required_change: Add the required green/black colour semantics, or correct the semantic_brief if BOYCAN62 is intentionally an uncoloured generic/paper-style can.

verdicts.expected_shape: can/cylindrical buoy body with red-green-red horizontal band order.
verdicts.judge_comments: Band count and order now match the RGR semantic brief.
verdicts.observed_shape: Can buoy with three horizontal bands red, green, red.

verdicts.expected_shape: can/cylindrical buoy body with green-red-green horizontal band order.
verdicts.judge_comments: Band count and order now match the GRG semantic brief.
verdicts.observed_shape: Can buoy with three horizontal bands green, red, green.

verdicts.expected_shape: can/cylindrical buoy body preserving red/white lateral colour order from the semantic brief and reference witness.
verdicts.judge_comments: The source colour list is longer, but the repaired candidate matches the explicit repair/reference expectation of a visible RWR lateral can cue.
verdicts.observed_shape: Can buoy with visible horizontal red-white-red band sequence.
verdicts.required_change: No shape-semantic repair required; later visual QA may decide whether the full repeated source colour list needs more than the rendered RWR cue.

verdicts.expected_shape: isolated-danger can/cylindrical buoy with black-red-black order.
verdicts.judge_comments: The safety-critical isolated-danger BRB order is now visible and correct.
verdicts.observed_shape: Can buoy with three horizontal bands black, red, black.

verdicts.expected_shape: can/cylindrical buoy body preserving the white/orange special-purpose band semantics.
verdicts.judge_comments: The candidate no longer collapses to two bands and preserves the white/orange repeated cue used by the references/repair instruction.
verdicts.observed_shape: Can buoy with white-orange-white horizontal band cue.

verdicts.expected_shape: can/cylindrical buoy body with white-orange-white horizontal band order.
verdicts.judge_comments: Band count and WOW order now match the semantic brief.
verdicts.observed_shape: Can buoy with three horizontal bands white, orange, white.

verdicts.expected_shape: can/cylindrical buoy body with required orange colour.
verdicts.judge_comments: The shape family is correct, but the load-bearing colour is wrong: the SVG uses var(--yellow) and the semantic brief requires orange.
verdicts.observed_shape: Can/cylindrical buoy body filled yellow with black outline.
verdicts.required_change: Change BOYCAN79 body fill from yellow to orange while preserving the can body and black outline/stem.

verdicts.expected_shape: can/cylindrical buoy body preserving the special-purpose orange/white or white/orange repeated reference cue.
verdicts.judge_comments: The current brief and earlier repair wording disagree on whether to describe the row as orange/white or white/orange/white. The repaired SVG matches the explicit repair/reference expectation and is the correct can family.
verdicts.observed_shape: Can buoy with white-orange-white repeated horizontal band cue.
verdicts.required_change: No shape-semantic repair required; keep this row flagged for later visual QA if the source colour order ambiguity must be resolved.

verdicts.expected_shape: can/cylindrical buoy body preserving red/white lateral colour order from the semantic brief and reference witness.
verdicts.judge_comments: The candidate now has the expected RWR visual cue from the repair/reference contract; the longer source colour list is not treated as a semantic failure at this gate.
verdicts.observed_shape: Can buoy with visible horizontal red-white-red band sequence.
verdicts.required_change: No shape-semantic repair required; later visual QA may decide whether the full repeated source colour list needs more than the rendered RWR cue.

verdicts.expected_shape: can/cylindrical buoy body preserving red/white lateral colour order from the semantic brief and reference witness.
verdicts.judge_comments: The candidate now carries the visible RWR lateral cue and the correct can body family. The source colour list is longer than the visible cue, but prior reference/repair text calls for RWR.
verdicts.observed_shape: Can buoy with visible horizontal red-white-red band sequence.
verdicts.required_change: No shape-semantic repair required; later visual QA may decide whether the full repeated source colour list needs more than the rendered RWR cue.

verdicts.expected_shape: conical/nun buoy body; semantic_brief lists required colours red and black for BOYCON01.
verdicts.judge_comments: Shape family is repaired, but this strict semantic-brief rerun cannot pass it because the current candidate only carries black outline/white fill while the brief says red and black are required colours.
verdicts.observed_shape: Conical/nun buoy outline with white fill and black outline; no red fill or red/black load-bearing colour pair.
verdicts.required_change: Resolve the brief/reference conflict, then render the conical buoy with the required red/black colour semantics if the current semantic_brief is authoritative.

verdicts.expected_shape: isolated-danger conical/nun buoy with black-red-black order.
verdicts.judge_comments: The safety-critical isolated-danger BRB order is now visible and correct on the conical body.
verdicts.observed_shape: Conical/nun buoy with three horizontal bands black, red, black.

verdicts.expected_shape: conical/nun buoy body with red-green-red horizontal band order.
verdicts.judge_comments: Band count and order now match the RGR semantic brief without can/cone family confusion.
verdicts.observed_shape: Conical/nun buoy with three horizontal bands red, green, red.

verdicts.expected_shape: conical/nun buoy body with green-red-green horizontal band order.
verdicts.judge_comments: Band count and order now match the GRG semantic brief without can/cone family confusion.
verdicts.observed_shape: Conical/nun buoy with three horizontal bands green, red, green.
